name: image-ppt
description: Replicate raster figures and icons as clean, editable, hand-authored SVGs. Bundles image-to-svg (one icon crop -> faithful vector) and figure-to-svg-replica (a whole infographic -> master SVG via analyze/crop/vectorize/compose), plus an image-ppt router + knowledge layer (lesson/feedback/digest verbs, with lessons consulted before drawing). Use to vectorize figures for papers and slides so wording, colors, and layout stay editable.
